title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.090 - May purchase land
text:
47.090.  May purchase land. — The commissioners, or a majority of them, may purchase not less than fifty nor more than one hundred and sixty acres of land, and may receive as a donation such parcels of land or town lots, including the place selected as a seat of justice for said county, as they shall judge most expedient.
(RSMo 1939 § 13739) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12080; 1919 § 9480; 1909 § 3701
